title: Start
body:
Stanley...
I'm upset...
But you know what would cheer me up..?
A chocolate cupcake!!
Oh but not just any chocolate cupcake, specially topped with your gorgeous vanilla essence and finished off with rainbow sprinkles!!
Could you do that?
<<Finished>><<Ask>> 
Please?

title: ReceivedCupcake
body:
Oh, Thank you Stanley! Thank you so much!
This is exactly what I needed, I'm so happy...
Lets meet again soon!
Goodbye!
<<Finished>><<Awaken>> 
End

title: TutorialTorres
body:
<<Stanley>><< SHappy>> 
Hello there, dearest Ganache Knight! 
<<Torres>><<TMiff>> 
Stanley... 
Guess now that all the children are gone, you're off to bother me aren't you?
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
My, is that what you think of me? I'm offended, Torres!
<<STalk>> 
Actually I came here to ask you for a favour. Do you happen to have any leftover chocolate I could use?
<<Torres>><<TMiff>> 
...
Why are you asking me this? There's chocolate EVERYWHERE here!
If you're so desperate for chocolate, then go and shoot the cocoa flies. They've been bugging me for days and they always come back!
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>> 
That sounds like a plan...
<<Finished>>
<<FlyMinigame>> 
End

title: TutoAsk
body:
I really want one last cupcake for the road...
<<Finished>> 
End

title: Torreslevel1
body:
<<Stanley>><<SHappy>>
Sorry to bother you again, Torres~
<<Torres>><<TAngry>>
YOU-!!!!!!!
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
ME???
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>
Why is it that so many pests are attracted to this place lately?!
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>
Well, you know what they say.
The more pests there is here, the more ingredients we can get!
And this frog is perfect as melted chocolate toppings!
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>
Just get them out of here....
<<Finished>><<FrogMinigame>> 
end

title: StartLVL1
body:
...We don't want to go home.
..Father always comes back smelling... funny.
Sometimes he smells like berries... sometimes like limes...
...But when he smells like cherries...
...he gets really angry.
He shouts... and... sometimes he hits us.
We're scared he'll come home smelling like fruits again...
<<Finished>><<Ask>> 
end

title: TorresLVL1Complete
body:
<<Torres>><<TTalk>> 
That should be all of it... Thanks for the hand.
<<TMiff>>
....I guess.
<<Finished>> 
end

title: KriePlatformer
body:
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
Oh wait Stanley, come here!
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>
What is it, Your Majesty?
<<Krie>><<KHappy>>
If it's ingredients you need, then I think I have a few more around in the greenhouse here somewhere!
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>
Really?! That would be so helpful! Where can I get them?
<<Krie>><<KTalk>>
It's situated somewhere a bit dangerous, but I'm sure it'll be a piece of cupcake for a doll like you.
<<Finished>><<MinigamePlatform>> 
end
